evals.prompt: The Railway deploy is failing with a Prisma migration error. Help me debug.
evals.expected_output: Debugging steps for Railway migration failures
expectations: Mentions that prisma migrate deploy runs on start
Suggests verifying DATABASE_URL is set correctly
Mentions checking migration files are committed to git

evals.prompt: Add OPENROUTER_API_KEY as a new environment variable for production
evals.expected_output: Instructions for adding env var to Railway
expectations: Explains how to add env vars in Railway dashboard
Notes that NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix is needed only for client-side vars
